en.title: Business Management
en.description_initial: Organization are a way to group your social media accounts, Google My Business, and content creation. You can create multiple organizations and manage them separately.
en.seo_description_initial: Organization are a way to group your social media accounts, Google My Business, and content creation. You can create multiple organizations and manage them separately.

states.something_went_wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

wizard.title: Create New Project
wizard.subtitle_step1: Enter a website URL to automatically extract business details.
wizard.subtitle_step2: Analyzing your business model and brand identity...
wizard.subtitle_step3: Review and refine your business profile.
wizard.ai_description: Our AI will scan the website to automatically extract the company profile, core offering, and brand identity (including colors and typography).
wizard.website_url_desc: The primary domain of the business
wizard.explanation_desc: Briefly explain the business focus to guide the AI extraction
wizard.explanation_placeholder: E.g., A specialty coffee roaster focused on fair trade organic beans...
wizard.extract_profile_manually: Extract profile automatically or add manually

company_info.label: Company Information (Markdown)
company_info.description: This markdown document contains the comprehensive research report generated by our AI.

brand_identity.label: Brand Identity (JSON)
brand_identity.description: Structured representation of the brands visual identity, extracted from their website.

toast.extraction_failed_desc: Could not extract information from the website.
toast.brand_error_desc: Invalid JSON format in Brand Identity tab. Saving as empty object.

step_zero.title: Get Started
step_zero.subtitle: Complete these optional setup steps to get the most out of your business management.
step_zero.skip_hint: You can always complete these steps later in your settings.

actions.star_github_desc: Support our project by starring our repository
actions.follow_twitter_desc: Stay updated with our latest news and updates
actions.follow_linkedin_desc: Connect with us for professional updates
actions.follow_bluesky_desc: Join us on the decentralized social network
actions.follow_instagram_desc: See our visual content and behind-the-scenes
actions.follow_facebook_desc: Join our community and stay connected

fr.title: Gestion des entreprises
fr.description_initial: Les organisations sont un moyen de regrouper vos comptes de médias sociaux, Google My Business et la création de contenu. Vous pouvez créer plusieurs organisations et les gérer séparément.
fr.seo_description_initial: Les organisations sont un moyen de regrouper vos comptes de médias sociaux, Google My Business et la création de contenu. Vous pouvez créer plusieurs organisations et les gérer séparément.

states.business_added_successfully: L'entreprise a été ajoutée avec succès.
states.something_went_wrong: Quelque chose s'est mal passé. Veuillez réessayer.

placeholders.name: Entrez le nom de l'entreprise
placeholders.phone: Entrez le numéro de téléphone de l'entreprise
placeholders.website: Entrez l'URL du site web de l'entreprise

es.title: Gestión de negocios
es.description_initial: Las organizaciones son una forma de agrupar sus cuentas de redes sociales, Google My Business y la creación de contenido. Puede crear múltiples organizaciones y administrarlas por separado.
es.seo_description_initial: Las organizaciones son una forma de agrupar sus cuentas de redes sociales, Google My Business y la creación de contenido. Puede crear múltiples organizaciones y administrarlas por separado.

states.business_added_successfully: El negocio ha sido agregado exitosamente.
states.something_went_wrong: Algo salió mal. Por favor, inténtalo de nuevo.

placeholders.name: Ingrese el nombre del negocio
placeholders.phone: Ingrese el número de teléfono del negocio
placeholders.email: Ingrese el correo electrónico del negocio
placeholders.website: Ingrese la URL del sitio web del negocio

de.title: Unternehmensverwaltung
de.description_initial: Organisationen sind eine Möglichkeit, Ihre Social-Media-Konten, Google My Business und die Inhaltserstellung zu gruppieren. Sie können mehrere Organisationen erstellen und separat verwalten.
de.seo_description_initial: Organisationen sind eine Möglichkeit, Ihre Social-Media-Konten, Google My Business und die Inhaltserstellung zu gruppieren. Sie können mehrere Organisationen erstellen und separat verwalten.
